name: @coworkany/sidecar
description: CoworkAny Agent Orchestrator - Sidecar process for desktop app

scripts.build: bun build --target=bun -e electron -e chromium-bidi -e chromium-bidi/* -e playwright -e playwright-core -e playwright-core/* src/main-mastra.ts --outdir dist/build
scripts.test:agent:core: node scripts/run-tests-sequential.mjs tests/llm-core.test.ts tests/file-operations.test.ts tests/memory-learning.test.ts tests/gui-simulation.test.ts
scripts.test:agent:scenarios: node scripts/run-tests-sequential.mjs tests/capabilities.test.ts tests/user-scenarios.test.ts tests/e2e-composite.test.ts tests/openclaw-quick.test.ts tests/openclaw-simulation.test.ts tests/openclaw-extended.test.ts tests/openclow-comparison.test.ts
scripts.test:agent:research: node scripts/run-tests-sequential.mjs tests/websearch.test.ts tests/stock-research.test.ts tests/ppt-smart-city.test.ts tests/tts-speak.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:stable && npm run test:agent:core && npm run test:agent:scenarios && npm run test:agent:research && npm run test:browser && npm run test:desktop
scripts.test:mastra:phases: bun test tests/phase1-mastra-infra.test.ts tests/phase2-tools.test.ts tests/phase3-agent-loop.test.ts tests/phase4-control-plane.test.ts tests/phase5-memory.test.ts tests/phase6-final-validation.test.ts tests/mastra-entrypoint.test.ts tests/mastra-additional-commands.test.ts tests/mastra-scheduler-runtime.test.ts tests/mastra-bridge.test.ts tests/main-mastra-policy-gate.e2e.test.ts tests/scheduled-full-chain.e2e.test.ts tests/additional-commands-full-chain.e2e.test.ts
